languages.original_text: "Calcazar. That kin of yours, whose footsteps led you to this region. He is hiding something on one of the tomb worlds... something valuable. Something for which the so-called 'Yoke' was created. The Lord Inquisitor's ambitions are ludicrous in their grandiosity and doomed to fail, which is why I am making you an offer: I will help you deal with this human and the consequences of his deeds, and you — you will give me what he so covets and fears."

languages.text: "Калькасар. Тот твой сородич, по следам которого ты прибыл в этот регион. На одном из миров-гробниц он скрывает нечто... ценное. Нечто, для чего было создано так называемое "Ярмо". Амбиции Лорд-инквизитора смехотворны в своей грандиозности и обречены на провал, потому я предлагаю тебе сделку. Я помогу тебе совладать с этим человеком и последствиями его деяний, а ты — ты отдашь мне то, что он так алчет и чего так страшится".

languages.text: «Calcazar. Ese miembro de tu especie cuyos pasos te han traído a esta región. Oculta algo en uno de los mundos necrópolis... algo valioso. Algo para lo que creó ese "Yugo" suyo. Las ambiciones del Lord Inquisidor son grandiosas hasta el absurdo y están condenadas al fracaso, lo que me lleva a hacerte una oferta: te ayudaré a lidiar con este humano y con las consecuencias de sus actos, y, a cambio... me entregarás lo que tanto teme y anhela».
languages.original_text: "Calcazar. That kin of yours, whose footsteps led you to this region. He is hiding something on one of the Tomb Worlds... something valuable. languages.text: “卡尔卡扎。那个把你一路引到这片星域的同族，在某个墓穴世界藏了点东西……很有价值的东西。所谓的“圣枷”，就是为它打造的。那位大审判官的野心大得令人发笑，而且注定会失败，所以我向你提议，我帮你对付这个人，还有他搞出来的烂摊子，而你，则要把他既垂涎又恐惧的东西交给我。”
languages.original_text: "Calcazar. That kin of yours, whose footsteps led you to this region. He is hiding something on one of the Tomb Worlds... something valuable. Something for which the so-called 'Yoke' was created. The Lord Inquisitor's ambitions are ludicrous in their grandiosity and doomed to fail, which is why I am making you an offer: I will help you deal with this human and the consequences of his deeds, and you — you will give me what he so covets and fears."

traits.locale_text: “卡尔卡扎。那个把你一路引到这片星域的同族，在某个墓穴世界藏了点东西……很有价值的东西。所谓的“圣枷”，就是为它打造的。那位大审判官的野心大得令人发笑，而且注定会失败，所以我向你提议，我帮你对付这个人，还有他搞出来的烂摊子，而你，则要把他既垂涎又恐惧的东西交给我。”

languages.text: « Calcazar, cet humain dont les pas vous ont {mf|mené|menée} dans cette région. Il cache quelque chose dans l'un des mondes-nécropoles... une chose d'une grande valeur qui est à l'origine de la création de ce "Joug". Les ambitions du seigneur inquisiteur sont d'une démesure ridicule et vouées à l'échec, c'est pourquoi je vous présente cette offre : je vous aiderai à vous occuper de cet humain et des conséquences de ses actes ; en échange, vous me donnerez ce qu'il convoite et craint tant. »
languages.original_text: "Calcazar. That kin of yours, whose footsteps led you to this region. He is hiding something on one of the Tomb Worlds... something valuable. Something for which the so-called 'Yoke' was created. The Lord Inquisitor's ambitions are ludicrous in their grandiosity and doomed to fail, which is why I am making you an offer: I will help you deal with this human and the consequences of his deeds, and you — you will give me what he so covets and fears."

languages.text: "Calcazar. Adımları seni bu bölgeye yönlendiren soydaşın. Mezar dünyalarından birinde bir şey saklıyor... Değerli bir şey. Sözde 'Boyunduruk'un uğruna yaratıldığı bir şey. Lord Engizisyoncu'nun emelleri, ihtişamları içinde gülünç ve başarısız olmaya mahkûm. Sana bir teklifte bulunuyorum. Bu insanla ve eylemlerinin sonuçlarıyla başa çıkmana yardım edeceğim, sen de... Sen de bana onun arzuladığı ve korktuğu şeyi vereceksin."
languages.original_text: "Calcazar. That kin of yours, whose footsteps led you to this region. He is hiding something on one of the Tomb Worlds... something valuable. Something for which the so-called 'Yoke' was created. The Lord Inquisitor's ambitions are ludicrous in their grandiosity and doomed to fail, which is why I am making you an offer: I will help you deal with this human and the consequences of his deeds, and you — you will give me what he so covets and fears."

Sen de bana onun arzuladığı ve korktuğu şeyi vereceksin."

languages.text: "Calcazar. Der Mann, dessen Spur dich in diese Region geführt hat. Er verbirgt etwas auf einer der Gruftwelten ... etwas Wertvolles. Etwas, für das das sogenannte 'Joch' geschaffen wurde. Der Ehrgeiz des Großinquisitors ist in seiner Schwülstigkeit grotesk und zum Scheitern verurteilt. Deshalb mache ich dir ein Angebot: Ich werde dir im Umgang mit diesem Menschen und den Konsequenzen seiner Taten helfen und du ... du gibst mir, was er so sehr begehrt und fürchtet."
languages.original_text: "Calcazar. That kin of yours, whose footsteps led you to this region. He is hiding something on one of the Tomb Worlds... something valuable. Something for which the so-called 'Yoke' was created. Deshalb mache ich dir ein Angebot: Ich werde dir im Umgang mit diesem Menschen und den Konsequenzen seiner Taten helfen und du ... du gibst mir, was er so sehr begehrt und fürchtet."

languages.text: 「カルカザール。あなたをこの地域に導いたあなたの親族。彼は墓の惑星の一つに、何かを隠している。価値のあるもの。いわゆる「枷」が作られたもの。大インクィジターの野望は、その壮大さゆえに滑稽で、失敗に終わる。だから、私はあなたに提案する。この人間と彼の行為の責任を、私があなたに代わって処理する。そして、あなたはその人間が欲しがり恐れるものを、私に渡す。」
languages.original_text: "Calcazar. That kin of yours, whose footsteps led you to this region. He is hiding something on one of the Tomb Worlds... something valuable.
